title: 233rd Imperial Fighter Group

{{Quote|The 233rd got mauled by Rebel Y-wings and lost Ord Biniir.|[[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Evir Derricote]]|<ref name="Rogue Squadron 25" />}}
The '''233rd Imperial Fighter Group'''<ref name="233rd CSWE">{{CSWECite|III|205|233rd Imperial Fighter Group}}</ref> was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Fighter wing/Legends|wing]] that fought in the [[First Battle of Ord Biniir]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] against the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]<ref name="Rogue Squadron 25" /> by [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]].<ref name="Ord Biniir Date" /> In the battle, the fighter wing was decimated by<ref name="Rogue Squadron 25" /> a [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]]<ref name="233rd CSWE" /> of Rebel [[BTL-A4 Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]], with the [[Rebel pilot/Legends|pilots]] bragging about their victory. The Empire lost<ref name="Rogue Squadron 25" /> the [[Ord Biniir/Legends|planet]]<ref name="Ord Biniir CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|419|Ord Biniir}}</ref> as a result, and they commenced an [[Second Battle of Ord Biniir|operation]] to retake it in response. The effort was successful, and most of the [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] were destroyed.<ref name="Rogue Squadron 25" />

==Behind the scenes==
The 233rd Imperial Fighter Group was first mentioned in flashbacks in the [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 25|twenty-fifth]] issue of the ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron]]'' [[Star Wars comic books|comic-book]] series. The issue was written by [[Michael A. Stackpole]] and published by [[Dark Horse Comics]]<ref name="Rogue Squadron 25" /> on [[December 3]], [[1997]].<ref name="Marvel">{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54670/star_wars_x-wing_rogue_squadron_1995_25|text=Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron (1995) #25}}</ref> [[2008]]'s ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' provided the unit's full designation.<ref name="233rd CSWE" />
